44.reason: Error: This loop condition is incorrect; it should check for digit characters, not spaces. It will fail for multi-digit numbers or when next is an operator or '='.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: This loop condition is incorrect; it should check for digit characters, not spaces. It will fail for multi-digit numbers or when next is an operator or '='.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition should check for digit, not space. It will fail for multi-digit numbers without spaces, e.g., "12*34".]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrect: should be while(isdigit(next)) to correctly read multi-digit numbers; using next!=' ' will consume operators and other characters.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: should use isdigit(next) to read all digits; using next!=' ' incorrectly includes operators and '=' as part of the number, leading to wrong values.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition should be isdigit(next) to correctly parse multi-digit numbers. Using next!=' ' will cause infinite loops or incorrect parsing when spaces are absent or when operators/end-of-input follow immediately.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The condition should be isdigit(next) to correctly parse multi-digit numbers and stop at operators or spaces; using next!=' ' causes infinite loops or incorrect parsing when encountering operators, newlines, or the '=' terminator.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition assumes numbers are always followed by a space, but the input may end with '=' or have no trailing space. Also, it doesn't check for EOF or '=' which terminates the expression.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition is incorrect: it stops only at space, but numbers may be followed by operators or '=' without a space. Also, it doesn't check for EOF or end of input properly, leading to undefined behavior when reading beyond valid input.]

65.reason: Error: Same issue as above; loop condition should check for digits, not spaces.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Same issue as above; should check isdigit(next) instead of next!=' '.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Incorrect: should be while(isdigit(next)) for the same reason as above.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: same as above; should use isdigit(next) to correctly parse multi-digit numbers.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition should be isdigit(next) to correctly parse multi-digit numbers. Using next!=' ' will cause infinite loops or incorrect parsing when spaces are absent or when operators/end-of-input follow immediately.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The condition should be isdigit(next) to correctly parse multi-digit numbers and stop at operators or spaces; using next!=' ' causes infinite loops or incorrect parsing when encountering operators, newlines, or the '=' terminator.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: assumes space after number, but expression ends with '=', and there might be no space before '='. This can cause reading beyond valid input or infinite loop.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: loop condition assumes space terminates number, but expression ends with '=', and operators may follow digits directly without space. This causes incorrect parsing and potential infinite loops or reading invalid characters.]
